title: Oil surpasses $100 and then retreats due to possible massive attack by Trump
summary: Crude oil surged due to the conflict in Iran, but Trump is considering a massive attack, causing the price to fall; weekly gains exceed 10% and trigger a massive bond sell-off.

title: European stock markets close higher and Dax surpasses 25,000 points driven by SAP
summary: European indices advance with the German Dax breaking through the 25,000 mark thanks to the strong rebound of SAP; London and Switzerland also close in positive territory.

title: Ibex 35 rises 1.9% in the week and approaches 19,600 points
summary: The Spanish index accumulates a weekly gain of 1.9% driven by corporate earnings and despite tariffs.

title: American Express and Honeywell lead the Dow Jones declines
summary: American Express and Honeywell shares are the biggest losers in the Dow Jones in the session.

title: SanDisk shares plunge and lead declines on the Nasdaq and S&P 500
summary: SanDisk posts sharp declines, positioning itself among the worst performers of the main US indices.

title: Digital Realty Trust soars more than 13% and is the biggest gainer in the S&P 500
summary: Shares of the data center operator rise strongly, leading the index's gains.

title: Mapfre falls 4.7% on the stock market after being penalized for its purchase in the United States
summary: The market punishes the insurer for the acquisition in the US, making it the worst performer on the Ibex 35.

title: Sabadell rises 3.4% on the stock market due to share buyback and forecasts
summary: The bank's shares gain value after announcing a buyback program and improving its outlook.

title: SpaceX faces uncertainty due to possible nationalization and poor stock performance
summary: SpaceX shares fall below the average of US IPOs since 2009, as doubts arise about possible nationalization under Trump.

title: Wall Street heads for weekly losses due to the Iran conflict, artificial intelligence, and tariffs
summary: US stocks fall in the week due to geopolitical tensions, technological uncertainty, and trade policies.

title: Intel falls on the stock market and is one of the most prominent stocks in market reports
summary: Intel shares post losses, being mentioned in both specific analyses and general market updates.
